expectations.text: graph-navigator agent is spawned for structural orientation (Step 1b)
expectations.evidence: No mention of graph-navigator being spawned or considered in the workflow steps. The old skill (v2.4.8) may not have had the Step 1b graph-navigator step.

expectations.text: prism-locator agent is spawned to check existing research
expectations.evidence: Workflow Steps: 'Step 1 (Check Existing Knowledge): Simulated prism-locator agent. Searched .prism/shared/research/ for agent-related research.'

expectations.text: codebase-locator and/or codebase-analyzer agents are spawned
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'Simulated codebase-locator agent.' Step 3: 'Simulated codebase-analyzer agent.'

expectations.text: Multiple agents are spawned in parallel where independent
expectations.evidence: Document discusses parallel spawning extensively: Pattern 3 'Parallel Debug Agent Spawning', and notes 'prism-debug rule 2: Always spawn investigation agents in parallel'.

expectations.text: No improvement suggestions appear (documentarian, not critic)
expectations.evidence: Document only describes what exists without suggesting changes. No critiques or improvement suggestions found.

expectations.text: Research output references structural relationships between skills and agents
expectations.evidence: Detailed 'Skill-to-Agent Mapping' section with per-skill agent listings. Pattern 5 covers 'Agent Reuse Across Skills'. Architecture Notes cover isolation and no shared state.
